title: Pinterest Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Strong Revenue Growth
text: Pinterest reported first-quarter 2024 earnings that beat analyst estimates with strong revenue growth. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of $0.20 versus a $0.14 estimate, and revenue of $740 million beat the $700.3 million estimate. Global monthly active users reached 518 million compared to an estimated 503.75 million. Average revenue per user of $1.46 topped estimates of $1.39. The company reported revenue growth year over year driven by strong user growth across all regions. Adjusted EBITDA was $112.9 million in first-quarter 2024, up from prior-year quarter's tally of $27 million. The strong Q1 results reflected Pinterest's successful execution on product strategy and recovery to its fastest growth rates since 2021, with investments in AI and shoppability driving greater returns for advertisers.
